risks.title: Production Retrieval Contains Hardcoded Eval Page Mappings
risks.detail: _fallback_pages_for_query() and _supporting_pages_for_query() contain hardcoded document-name-to-page-number mappings for specific files (final annual report, wipo, leac).

risks.title: supporting_source_page Metadata Flag Used as Ranking Signal
risks.detail: The supporting_source_page flag is set based on eval-specific knowledge and used to boost chunk scores in ranking.

risks.title: No Sealed Test Set Exists
risks.detail: Only synthetic smoke fixtures (12 cases) exist. No real financial document evaluation dataset with document-level isolation.

risks.title: Financial Tools Not Wired Into Main Pipeline
risks.detail: 7 deterministic calculation operations implemented but rag_engine.py never imports or calls them.

risks.title: Answer Validation Not Wired Into Main Pipeline
risks.detail: Post-generation validation exists but is never called by the production query flow.

risks.title: rag_engine.py is ~2019 Lines
risks.detail: Monolithic orchestrator containing retrieval, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citations, and fallback logic.

risks.title: Model Metrics Not Verifiable From Artifacts
risks.detail: Parameter count, training tokens, and compression rate claims cannot be verified from committed artifacts.

risks.title: No Oracle Context Path for Upper-Bound Measurement
risks.detail: Cannot measure generation upper bound with perfect evidence; cannot distinguish retrieval vs generation failures.

risks.title: Intent Classification is Keyword-Only
risks.detail: Keyword-based classification may misclassify ambiguous queries that span multiple intent categories.

risks.title: No Staged Latency Tracking in Trace
risks.detail: Trace records total latency only; no per-stage breakdown.

risks.title: No Serving Benchmarks
risks.detail: No TTFT, tokens/s, or latency benchmarks exist for the inference service.

risks.title: SFT V2 Data Mixture Script Missing
risks.detail: build_sft_v2.py referenced in documentation but not found in repository.

risks.title: No Docker or Unified Deployment Config
risks.detail: No docker-compose.yml or single-command startup for the full system.

risks.title: NVIDIA API Dependency in Table Processing
risks.detail: Optional NVIDIA API for table enhancement; graceful fallback exists.

risks.title: No GPU Monitoring Script in CI
risks.detail: GPU monitor exists but not integrated into CI or health checks.
